summary: CRITICAL FAILURES: (1) Workflow references `New-BuildMatrix.Tests.ps1` and fixture files (basic.json, with-include-exclude.json, overcap.json) that do not exist in submission—workflow cannot run. (2) Actions unpinned to commit SHA (`actions/checkout@v4` should be SHA; explicit best_practices requirement). (3) Task mandates unit tests via Pester written first (TDD), but test file not provided/doesn't exist. Core logic in New-BuildMatrix.ps1 is sound (good error handling, type hints, helper factoring), but deliverable is non-functional. Regex parsing for strategy extraction in Run-ActTests.ps1 (lines ~115–125) is brittle; fragile fallbacks invite parsing failures. Submission incomplete; cannot ship or validate.
